name: Pumpkin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine yeast and warm water. Let it sit for about 5 minutes until frothy.
3. Add flour, pumpkin pie spice, lemon peel, salt, sugar, canned pumpkin, egg, butter, orange juice to the yeast mixture. Mix until well combined.
4. Pour batter into a greased loaf pan.
5. Bake in preheated oven for 45-50 minutes or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the side.
6. Allow bread to cool before slicing.
